title: Estriol + GHK-Cu Cream: Women's Compounded Anti-Aging Topical
titleHtml: Estriol + GHK-Cu Cream: Women's Anti-Aging Topical.
deck: Weak estrogen estriol plus copper peptide GHK-Cu, niacinamide, and hyaluronic acid in one compounded face cream — localized skin aging support without full systemic HRT.
metaDescription: Estriol GHK-Cu niacinamide cream for women: topical anti-aging, estriol skin benefits, copper peptide collagen support, compounded facial longevity.
bodyHtml:
Estriol (E3) is the weakest of the three major estrogens, abundant in pregnancy and used topically for skin thickness and hydration in perimenopausal women. GHK-Cu stimulates collagen gene expression and tissue remodeling. Niacinamide supports barrier function; hyaluronic acid hydrates.

Compounded estriol/GHK-Cu/niacinamide/HA creams target facial aging with lower systemic estrogen exposure than oral or patch HRT, though some absorption occurs. Popular in med-spa and telehealth longevity skin stacks paired with NAD+ face cream or injectable peptides.

Not for use in estrogen-receptor-positive breast cancer without oncology guidance. CLYR Health offers estriol + GHK-Cu cream as a preview skin SKU.

sources.label: Pickart L, Margolina A. GHK-Cu regenerative actions. Biomed Res Int. 2018.
Bissett DL, et al. Niacinamide facial skin appearance. Dermatol Surg. 2005.
